items.title: GPT-5.2 in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.description: GPT-5.2 now powers Microsoft 365 Copilot for enhanced reasoning, multi-step execution, and complex problem solving

europe.notes: EU Data Boundary compliant. Local LLM processing in DE, IT, PL, ES, SE by 2026.
europe.regulation: GDPR, EU AI Act Art.52 transparency

americas.notes: Full availability across US, Canada, LatAm. US data centers primary.

middleEast.notes: UAE in-country processing from early 2026. Dubai & Abu Dhabi DCs.

items.title: Anthropic Model Partnership
items.description: Microsoft expands model choice through Anthropic partnership with data processing agreement, enabling Claude models alongside GPT

europe.notes: ⚠️ Anthropic models currently OUTSIDE EU Data Boundary scope.

americas.notes: Full availability. Processed via Anthropic US infrastructure.

middleEast.notes: Not yet available. Data sovereignty review pending.

items.title: Agent Mode in Word
items.description: Copilot can directly edit, refine, and rewrite documents based on natural language prompts. 'Edit with Copilot' active by default

europe.notes: Available. Sensitivity labels enforced. DLP policies apply.

items.title: Agent Mode in Excel
items.description: Copilot autonomously analyzes data, creates formulas, builds charts, and performs complex data operations in Excel

europe.notes: DLP for financial data recommended.
europe.regulation: GDPR profiling rules may apply for personal data analysis

items.title: Facilitator Agent in Teams
items.description: AI facilitator provides real-time meeting notes, action items, and follow-up summaries during Teams meetings

europe.notes: Transcription data stored in EU. DPIA recommended for large-scale use.
europe.regulation: GDPR Art.35 DPIA, Works Council notification in DE/AT/NL

americas.regulation: State recording consent laws may apply

items.title: Custom MCP Connectors
items.description: Admins can create and deploy custom Model Context Protocol connectors from M365 Admin Center to integrate proprietary data

europe.notes: Data flowing through connectors subject to GDPR. Conduct DPIA for sensitive data sources.

middleEast.notes: Available. Verify data doesn't cross borders.

items.title: Copilot Readiness Dashboard
items.description: New centralized readiness page in M365 admin center with deployment essentials, end-user experience, and data security configurations

europe.notes: Includes EU-specific compliance checklist.

items.title: Voice Support in Word & PowerPoint
items.description: Voice interaction with Copilot for speaking commands and receiving audio responses in Word and PowerPoint

europe.notes: Voice memory feature requires updated Purview policies in 2026.

americas.regulation: BIPA in Illinois for voice data

middleEast.notes: Available. Voice data processing location to be verified.

items.title: Expanded SharePoint Grounding
items.description: Copilot Chat grounds responses using SharePoint lists, sites, and document libraries for contextual answers

europe.notes: Restricted search recommended to limit sensitive site exposure.

items.title: AI-Powered People Skills
items.description: AI-powered skill updates for user profiles, manageable from the Microsoft 365 admin center

europe.notes: Employee profiling may require Works Council approval in DE/AT/FR.

items.title: Purview Integration in M365 Admin
items.description: Microsoft Purview integrated into M365 admin center for unified data security visibility, oversharing risk assessment, and DLP for Copilot

europe.notes: Critical for GDPR compliance. Enables oversharing detection.

items.title: Agent Mode in PowerPoint
items.description: Copilot creates, edits, and enhances presentations including design, layout, and content. Chat-based rewriting and speaker notes

europe.notes: Expected Q2 2026. Will follow EU Data Boundary.

items.title: =COPILOT() Function in Excel
items.description: Invoke AI capabilities directly in cell formulas with the =COPILOT() worksheet function for text generation, classification, summarization

europe.notes: Expected Q4 2026.
europe.regulation: EU AI Act transparency for automated decisions

items.title: Agents in Viva Engage Communities
items.description: Deploy AI agents within Viva Engage communities for enhanced discussions, Q&A, and community engagement

europe.notes: Works Council implications for employee monitoring.

items.title: Multi-Agent Architecture
items.description: Multiple AI agents working together on complex, sophisticated workflows with inter-agent communication policies

europe.notes: High-risk AI system under EU AI Act. Requires conformity assessment.

items.title: Custom Agents in Outlook
items.description: Access and interact with custom Copilot Studio agents directly within Outlook for task-specific assistance

europe.notes: Agent data access governed by existing permissions.

items.title: Reimagined SharePoint
items.description: Significant upgrade establishing foundation for AI-assisted creation with modern page experiences and Copilot integration

europe.notes: Preview March 2026, target release April 2026.

items.title: Microsoft Agent 365
items.description: Centralized control plane for managing all AI agents across M365 with identity, policy, email, Teams access, and lifecycle management

europe.notes: Critical governance tool. Expected to support EU AI Act agent inventory requirements.

items.title: Sales Development Agent
items.description: AI agent dedicated to sales development workflows, customer engagement, pipeline management, and CRM integration

europe.notes: Customer data processing requires DPIA.

items.title: Copilot App Builder
items.description: Create and deploy custom apps through natural language using Copilot. Low-code/no-code application development

europe.notes: Apps handling personal data must comply with GDPR by design.

items.title: Microsoft 365 E7 Tier (Speculated)
items.description: Potential new subscription tier bundling Copilot + advanced AI agent management, treating agents as managed entities with identity and policies

europe.notes: Would simplify per-agent governance billing. EU competitive scrutiny possible.

items.title: Copilot Pages GA
items.description: Collaborative AI-generated canvases for multi-colleague collaboration, editing, and sharing AI content as business assets

items.title: Copilot Frontier Program Launch
items.description: Preview program for experimental Copilot features including early access to Agent Mode and new AI models

items.title: DLP Policies for Copilot
items.description: Data Loss Prevention policies now apply to Copilot interactions, preventing sensitive data exposure in AI responses

items.title: SharePoint Agents
items.description: Site owners can create, manage, and share AI-powered agents within SharePoint for task automation

items.title: Copilot Memory & Personalization
items.description: Copilot remembers user preferences across sessions. Users can view, manage, and delete memories

items.title: Proactive & Multimodal Copilot
items.description: Copilot becomes proactive, suggesting actions before being asked. Multimodal input support (images, voice, text)

items.title: SIEM Integration for Copilot
items.description: Copilot activity logs integrable with Security Information and Event Management systems

items.title: Copilot Analytics GA
items.description: Measure adoption and business impact with out-of-the-box experiences, Viva Insights at no extra charge

items.title: AI Administrator Role GA
items.description: Dedicated admin role for managing Copilot and AI services without requiring Global Admin permissions

items.title: Copilot in Admin Centers GA
items.description: Copilot integration in M365, Teams, SharePoint admin centers for routine task optimization and PowerShell generation

items.title: Agent Creation Permissions
items.description: Configurable permissions for who can create and publish AI agents in the organization

items.title: Temporary Chat Mode
items.description: Interact with Copilot without saving conversation history — designed for confidential data handling

items.title: 300-User Licensing Minimum Removed
items.description: Copilot license available to businesses of all sizes, removing previous 300-user minimum requirement

items.title: Restricted SharePoint Search (Preview)
items.description: Admins can curate up to 100 allowed SharePoint sites for Copilot to reference, limiting AI data access

items.title: Graph-Grounded Chat in Outlook
items.description: Copilot chat in Outlook can parse enterprise data through Microsoft Graph for contextual conversations

items.title: Local File Grounding
items.description: Ground Copilot chat in local files stored on user's system, extending AI context beyond cloud

items.title: Copilot Mobile App
items.description: Web Copilot accessible via mobile app on iOS and Android with commercial data protection

items.title: Notebook Interface
items.description: Scratchpad interface for refining longer, complex prompts with better formatting control

items.title: 16 Additional Languages
items.description: Copilot expanded language support to 16 more languages for broader international coverage

items.title: Copilot in SharePoint Content
items.description: Rewrite and enhance posts, adjust tone and length, create new content in SharePoint

items.title: Image Generation in Word & PowerPoint
items.description: Generate custom images with DALL-E in Word and PowerPoint. Stock library search and slide design blending

items.title: Copilot Dashboard (Viva Insights)
items.description: Six-month Copilot usage history dashboard for tenant-wide adoption visibility and measurement

items.title: Word 80,000 Word Summarization
items.description: Document summarization in Word increased to handle documents up to 80,000 words

items.title: Copilot Pages (Preview)
items.description: Dynamic, persistent canvas for multi-colleague AI collaboration — a new AI-native content surface

items.title: Excel Python Integration
items.description: Copilot generates, explains, and inserts Python code in Excel for advanced analytics and data science

items.title: Copilot Agents Introduction
items.description: First introduction of Copilot Agents concept — specialized AI with specific skills and knowledge

items.title: Scheduled Prompts
items.description: Automate recurring prompts at specific times in Teams, Office.com/chat, and Outlook

items.title: Copilot in OneDrive
items.description: Ask questions about files, summarize documents, and search content without opening files in OneDrive

items.title: Copilot Studio Enhanced
items.description: Create custom Copilot experiences, integrate with Workday/SAP/ServiceNow, drag-and-drop interface

items.title: SharePoint Advanced Management for Copilot
items.description: Site Access Reviews, content governance, reduce oversharing and content sprawl for Copilot readiness

items.title: Sensitivity Labels for Copilot
items.description: Prevent Copilot from summarizing content from sensitive labeled documents in SharePoint/OneDrive

items.title: Copilot Control System
items.description: Comprehensive IT management framework with data protection, governance, access control, and visibility for agents

items.title: AI Administrator Role (Preview)
items.description: Dedicated admin role for AI services management announced at Ignite 2024

items.title: Copilot in OneNote (Mac/iPad)
items.description: Contextual chat for summarizing, rewriting, and organizing notes in OneNote on Mac and iPad

items.title: Excel Clean Data Feature
items.description: Copilot detects and fixes text inconsistencies, number format issues, and extra spaces in Excel data

items.title: Teams Intelligent Meeting Recap
items.description: AI-generated summaries for impromptu calls and 'Meet now' meetings with action items

items.title: Edge Sidebar Copilot
items.description: Summarize webpages and PDFs, get contextual prompt suggestions from Edge browser sidebar

items.title: Copilot Prompt Gallery
items.description: Discover, save, and share prompts. Industry-specific prompt collections in Copilot Lab
